promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver — both parties waive right to jury trial
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not explicitly in reader report; found in DA Section 21.11 during depth pass

promoted_facts.fact: No force majeure clause in either agreement
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not explicitly flagged in reader report; confirmed during contract burden depth

promoted_facts.fact: Franchisor crisis control rights — may take control of crisis situations including media, temporarily close restaurant
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report; FA Section 29.1

promoted_facts.fact: Customer data ownership — all customer data owned by franchisor
promoted_facts.reader_report_section: Not in reader report; FA Section 7.5

promoted_facts.fact: Shared services not priced — franchisor receives management/admin services from affiliate at no recorded cost, understating true operating expenses
Revenue concentration — each of 6 franchisees constitutes >10% of revenues. Loss of any would materially impact operations.
Opening timeline: typically 15 months from signing to opening
Site selection deadline: 270 days first unit, 180 days subsequent
